message:
chore: update extension checksums and regenerate perf budget reports

- docs/extension-artifact-provenance.json: update SHA256 checksum for
  @zenobius/pi-dcp artifact (new version fetched)
- docs/extension-master-catalog.json: sync checksum for zenobius-pi-dcp
  entry, fix missing trailing newline
- tests/perf/reports: regenerate all budget reports (PERF_BUDGETS.md,
  budget_events.jsonl, budget_summary.json) — all budgets now show
  NO_DATA status as criterion benchmark data was cleared between runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
